feedback.text: Payment processors need to be prohibited from discriminating against legal purchases, or using threats of revoking service to control what legal goods or services are allowed to buy or sell; a good example of this is Mastercard/Visa's underhanded tactics to remove games from Steam/Itch, which was done in the name of 'protection' but was, in truth, coercive censorship, as can be seen by the number of games discussing LGBTQ topics and non-traditional sexual relationships which were completely delisted. Visa and Mastercard claim they aren't responsible, but that is because they used proxies, and caved to pressure from a single, fringe, radical, bigoted Australian group.
